title: Jeffrey Gundlach says Fed's Warsh is not going to be the 'easy money' chairman many hoped for
summary_full: Gundlach said Warsh's stance reduces the risk of overly accommodative monetary policy that could reignite inflation and push longer-term borrowing costs higher.
summary_public: Gundlach said Warsh's stance reduces the risk of overly accommodative monetary policy that could reignite inflation and push longer-term borrowing costs higher.
